THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LY, XUAN NGUYET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORZYNSKI, BERNARD MORZYNSKI, SOPHIA $1,635.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,770.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $450 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGES, AND $1185 FOR GENERAL AND SPECIAL DAMAGES FOR BODILY INJURY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
